purpose: Reviewed and safer final plan for submission after filtering Hermes mock/stub outputs.

final_scene_table.purpose: Opening hook linking information technology with future learning.
final_scene_table.visual_plan: Campus, keyboard, laptop, code or fast B-roll.
final_scene_table.subtitle: 用資訊技術，把想法變成可以實作的作品。

final_scene_table.visual_plan: Department title text, classroom or campus exterior.
final_scene_table.subtitle: 國立臺南大學資訊工程學系，培養理解問題、設計系統與實作應用的人才。

final_scene_table.purpose: Show learning features without unverifiable claims.
final_scene_table.visual_plan: Programming, AI/data/system/network practice, screen close-up without private data.
final_scene_table.subtitle: 從程式設計、人工智慧、資料處理到系統與網路，學習不只停在概念，也落實在動手實作。

final_scene_table.visual_plan: Whiteboard discussion, group work, prototype or demo footage.
final_scene_table.subtitle: 在專題與團隊合作中，學生練習溝通、分工與展示，把技術轉化成能被理解的成果。

final_scene_table.visual_plan: Classroom, corridor, peer discussion, teacher-student interaction with consent.
final_scene_table.subtitle: 學習的過程，也包含提問、討論與彼此支援。

final_scene_table.visual_plan: Text ending card. Use official logo only if permission is confirmed.
final_scene_table.subtitle: 歡迎認識國立臺南大學資訊工程學系。

removed_or_rewritten_risks: Unverified claims about international collaboration or external funding were removed.
Competition awards, rankings, admission scores and employment outcomes are not used unless later cited.
Official logos are replaced by text titles unless permission is confirmed.

production_tools.note: These tools are disclosed for final asset production and do not replace the Hermes Agent workflow.

human_confirmation_required: Final MP4 filename and file size
Team member names and student IDs
ChatGPT image filenames, generation dates, and usage terms
Suno song title, output filename, generation date, and usage terms
